_meta.scenario: Two enforce-mode appliances under the SAME site each have rejections in the 6h window. The invariant must produce ONE Violation per appliance — proves the per-appliance scope of the SQL's GROUP BY (sa.site_id, sa.mac_address, sa.appliance_id).
_meta.captured: 2026-04-28 round-table P1 follow-up (synthetic; modeled after the 3-appliance NVB2 site)
